checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, user is in an allowed role, and role-specific constraints are met (clearance>3 and not HighlyRestricted for ClinicalResearcher, networkRiskScore<20 and compliant device for PI, clearance>5 for DataManager)

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, user is in an allowed role, and role-specific constraints are met

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment, unless user is a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment, unless user is a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel>3, matching department, on an Active project with non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, on Active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, on Active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_dm_edit_highly_restricted
checks.description: A DataManager with clearanceLevel>5, matching department, on Active project MUST be able to Edit even HighlyRestricted documents

checks.name: floor_global_auditor_cross_dept_view
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher (clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, Active project) MUST be able to View even when department doesn't match

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: View is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, user is in an allowed role, and role-specific constraints are met (clearance>3 and not HighlyRestricted for ClinicalResearcher, networkRiskScore<20 and compliant device for PI, clearance>5 for DataManager)
